title: ANW10012 Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator (ICD)
text_en: Your heart pumps oxygenated blood throughout your body.

title: ANW10012 Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator (ICD)
text_en: Rhythmic electrical impulses inside your heart cause its muscular walls to contract, ensuring

title: ANW10012 Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator (ICD)
text_en: your heart beats steadily.

title: ANW10012 Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator (ICD)
text_en: If problems occur with your heart's electrical system, you may develop an abnormal, potentially

title: ANW10012 Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator (ICD)
text_en: life-threatening heart beat called arrhythmia.

title: ANW10012 Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator (ICD)
text_en: Your doctor may want you to have an implantable cardio-verter defibrillator or ICD to restore

title: ANW10012 Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator (ICD)
text_en: the heart's normal rhythm and prevent sudden cardiac death.

title: ANW10012 Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator (ICD)
text_en: During the procedure, your doctor will thread a small wire through a vein until it reaches

title: ANW10012 Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator (ICD)
text_en: your right ventricle.

title: ANW10012 Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator (ICD)
text_en: The wires continuously monitor the heart's rhythm.

title: ANW10012 Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator (ICD)
text_en: After verifying the wire is in the correct location and works properly, your doctor will

title: ANW10012 Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator (ICD)
text_en: attach the wire to the ICD generator.

title: ANW10012 Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator (ICD)
text_en: Then your doctor will insert the ICD device under the skin of your chest below the collarbone.

title: ANW10012 Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator (ICD)
text_en: The battery-powered ICD constantly monitors your heart beat using a computer.

title: ANW10012 Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator (ICD)
text_en: If a life-threatening arrhythmia occurs, the ICD delivers an electrical shock to your

title: ANW10012 Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator (ICD)
text_en: heart, resetting your heart beat back to normal.

title: ANW10012 Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillator (ICD)
text_en: The ICD can also be programmed to paste the heart and restore its natural rhythm.

title: Common Causes of Heart Failure
text_en: Any condition or disease that damages your heart's ability to pump blood can cause

title: Common Causes of Heart Failure
text_en: heart failure.

title: Common Causes of Heart Failure
text_en: For example, the most common cause is coronary artery disease in which blood vessels that

title: Common Causes of Heart Failure
text_en: supply your heart muscle, called coronary arteries, become blocked by a fatty substance called

title: Common Causes of Heart Failure
text_en: plaque.

title: Common Causes of Heart Failure
text_en: Other common causes of heart failure include uncontrolled high blood pressure and high

title: Common Causes of Heart Failure
text_en: blood sugar in diabetes.

title: Common Causes of Heart Failure
text_en: Less common causes of heart failure include diseased, infected or damaged heart valves,

title: Common Causes of Heart Failure
text_en: your regular heartbeats, called arrhythmias, heart defects, poisons or substance abuse, lung

title: Common Causes of Heart Failure
text_en: diseases, and breathing problems during sleep, called sleep apnea.
